About Me

Hi! I'm Hiroshi Tanaka, a creative developer passionate about building fast, beautiful, and accessible web experiences. With 6+ years of experience across frontend and full-stack development, I love turning complex problems into elegant solutions.

When I'm not coding, I'm exploring cloud architecture, contributing to open source, or hiking in the mountains.

Skills

JavaScriptTypeScriptReactAstroNode.jsCSSTailwindGitAWSDocker

Experience

Senior Frontend Developer — TechCorp Inc.

2022 – Present

Led UI architecture for a SaaS platform serving 50k+ users. Migrated legacy app to React + TypeScript.

Frontend Developer — Startup Labs

2020 – 2022

Built responsive web apps and design systems. Improved Lighthouse scores from 60 to 95+.

Junior Developer — Freelance

2018 – 2020

Delivered 15+ client websites with a focus on performance and accessibility.
